name: Multicolor Sewing Thread Set (12 Spools)
description: Set of 12 high-quality polyester sewing threads in assorted colours. Strong, smooth, and tangle-free thread compatible with all sewing machines and hand stitching. 200 metres per spool.

name: Hand Sewing Needle Set (25 pieces)
description: Assorted hand sewing needles in 25-piece set covering sizes for darning, embroidery, tapestry, and general sewing. High-carbon steel with rust-resistant coating. Comes in a storage case.

name: Assorted Button Set (100 pieces)
description: Mixed set of 100 assorted plastic and metal buttons in various sizes, shapes, and colours. Suitable for shirts, kurtas, blouses, and craft projects. Includes flat back and shank buttons.

name: YKK Nylon Zipper Set (10 pieces)
description: Premium nylon-coil zippers in 10-piece assorted set. Smooth snag-free operation suitable for dresses, bags, cushion covers, and trousers. Available in multiple lengths.

name: Saree Blouse Hook and Eye Set (50 pairs)
description: Strong metal hook and eye closures for saree blouses, dresses, and skirts. Nickel-plated for rust resistance and smooth closing. 50 pairs in assorted sizes for all garment types.

name: Elastic Band Roll (1 metre)
description: High-quality stretchable elastic band roll for waistbands, cuffs, and garment finishing. Durable and long-lasting elasticity that does not weaken after washing. Available in multiple widths.

name: Tailor Chalk (5 pieces)
description: Flat tailor's chalk for marking fabric before cutting and stitching. Leaves clean marks that brush off easily without staining. Works on all types of fabric including silk and cotton.

name: Custom Stitching Service
description: Professional stitching service for blouses, salwar-kameez, kurtas, frocks, and alterations. Precise measurement-based stitching by experienced tailor. Delivery in 3–7 days.
documentsRequired: Customer measurements or previous garment for reference
